titleStmt.title: SII 24.412: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 412. (A.R. No. 36 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the endowment of two vēli of land in Tuṟaiyūr and Muttaraśanallūr by Saṅkaraśayyaṉ, son of the brother of Avaśaram Ma[lla]rasayyaṉ, who purchased them for 100 poṉ, for offerings to god at Āyirakkāl-tirumaṇḍapam on the occasion of the festival of Vēdapārāyaṇa (recitation of the Vēda) in the month of Dhanus, for the merit of the king. The details of date viz. Śaka 1455 expressed by the chronogram, Mēśēvandyē in the Sanskrit verse at the end Vijaya, Makara, śu. 6, Tuesday, Aśvati correspond to A.D. 1534, January 20, Tuesday, ·72, f.d.n. ·36.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . meśevandye śakasyābde medinījāniraccutaḥ . prābhṛtam raṅgiṇaścakre pratihāyanamāravi . svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājapara meśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa śrīmatu Accutadeyvamahārāyat pṛduvirājyam paṇṇi Aruāḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 5 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa vicaiy samvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu śaṣṭiyum maṅkalavāramum
peṟṟaaśvatinakṣatrattu nāḷ śāṇḍilya gotrattuāślāyinasūtrattu Āvasaram mallarasayyaṉ tamaiyaṉār putrat caṅkaracayyaṉ puṟavakai Ātāyam Āka vāṅki Accutatevamahārāyar Upaiyam Ākak koṇṭu cetta nilattukku viparam . tuṟaiyūrilk koṇṭu Irācavipāṭaṉāl rūpāy (1/2) li Ituvum muttaraca nana and la in a combined formllūrilk koṇṭu cetta rūpāy 1nyama Āka rūpāy 1(1/2)nyama Ituvum meṟpaṭiyūril Arukā (ṉ)maiyil koṇṭu cetta rūpāy(1/4)¥ḷe
Āka rūpāy 2li Inta nilam Iruvelikkum vilaippaṭi pon_100 Intap poṉ nūṟṟukkum koṇṭu cetta Irācavipāṭaṉāl nilam Iruveliyum teṉkaraipāṇṭi kulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku taṉuṟumāsam vetapārāyaṇattirunāḷ Eṭṭām tiruvattiyenamRead tiruvatyayanam Āyirakkāl tirumaṇṭapattil Amutu ceytaruḷa tirupa
kkaṭimaic ciṟappukku Accudadevamahārāyat Upaiyam Āka Inta Iruveli nilattil Utaiyaṅ koṇṭe varuṣam varuṣam toṟum nūṟutaḷikaiyum Atirasam paṭi Āṟukku Atirasam muṉṉūṟṟu Āṟu vaṭai paṭi Āṟukku vaṭai muṉṉūṟṟu Āṟu cukiyaṉ paṭi Āṟukku cukiyaṉ muṉṉūṟṟu Āṟu pori Amutu Aṟukala(m)mum cantaṉappaṭi Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilai Amutu kompil
Añcu koṭiyil Añcu mutal kaṟi Amutum patakkum Uḻakkum tappāmal ney Amutu paruppu Amutu Uṇṭāṉatum piṉṉaiyum palacampāraṅkaḷum Uḷpaṭa Intappaṭiye Ācantrārkka sthāyiāka Accudadevamahārāyar poliyūṭṭāka ĀmuRead amututu ceytaruḷak kaṭavatākavum . Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilk kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyat Eḻuttu .
meśevandye śakasyāpte medinījāniraccutaḥ . prābhṛtam raṅgiṇaścakre pratihāyanamāravi .
Digital edition of SII 24.412 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
